title: myzorrhiza multiflora
intro: Myzorrhiza multiflora, also known as Black Fungus or Poria Cocos, is a type of medicinal fungus that belongs to the family Polyporaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat a range of health conditions. The health benefits of Myzorrhiza multiflora include its ability to boost the immune system, lower cholesterol levels, and aid in digestion, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease and certain types of cancer. Myzorrhiza multiflora is commonly prepared as a powder or capsule for oral consumption, and can also be brewed into a tea or added to soups and stews for its medicinal properties.
